scope.target: Add thin runtime wrappers for the dev-workflow skill.
scope.dependency_radius: Runtime wrapper indexes and canonical skill spec.
constraints: Wrappers must point to the canonical spec.
Wrappers must not become source-of-truth documents.
non_goals: Do not add runtime-specific business rules.

results.summary: Added thin Codex/current-runtime and Claude-compatible wrappers that point to the canonical dev-workflow skill spec and references.
tests_run: Manual wrapper comparison against repo-structure-sync wrapper pattern
